title: Complete Lifecycle Engine Package + Extend AgentSchema and Agent.Info
consumer_purpose: Provide the lifecycle engine package for OpenCode agents with schema, engine, and built-in lifecycle definitions plus integration into AgentSchema and Agent.Info
claim_atoms: definition.ts provides Phase, Transition, LifecycleDefinition, PhaseResult schemas and standalone types
engine.ts has LifecycleEngine Effect Service with execute(), retry/escalation, and onPhaseEnter/onPhaseExit hooks
builtins.ts has CARTOGRAPHER, EXECUTOR, CRITIC, LANE_OWNER lifecycle constants
config/agent.ts AgentSchema has optional lifecycle field
agent/agent.ts Agent.Info has optional lifecycle field
content:
# Lifecycle Engine Package — Revised Completion Plan

## Current State
- definition.ts has schemas + duplicate constants (CARTOGRAPHER_LIFECYCLE etc.)
- builtins.ts has different versions of the same constants (CARTographer_lifecycle etc.)
- Type errors: Schema.Schema.Type produces readonly arrays incompatible with mutable object literals
- Missing: JSON Schema, config/agent.ts lifecycle field, agent/agent.ts lifecycle field, onPhaseEnter/onPhaseExit hooks

## Changes

### 1. packages/opencode/src/lifecycle/definition.ts
- **REMOVE** the 4 duplicate constants (CARTOGRAPHER_LIFECYCLE, etc.) — they conflict with builtins.ts versions
- **CHANGE** Phase, Transition, LifecycleDefinition, PhaseResult from Schema.Schema.Type aliases to standalone interfaces
- Keep schemas for runtime validation
- Plain interfaces avoid readonly/mutable mismatch

### 2. packages/opencode/src/lifecycle/engine.ts
- Add `onPhaseEnter?: (phase, input) => Effect<void>` to Interface
- Add `onPhaseExit?: (phase, result, input) => Effect<void>` to Interface
- Integrate hooks into the execute() retry loop
- The hooks fire for every phase attempt (including retries)

### 3. packages/opencode/src/lifecycle/builtins.ts (no changes)
- Constants are well-defined and use correct phase structure
- Remove type annotations — use `satisfies LifecycleDefinition` instead of `: LifecycleDefinition`
- Or just remove explicit type annotation and let inference work

### 4. docs/schemas/rig.lifecycle_definition.v1.schema.json
- Full JSON Schema for LifecycleDefinition including Phase and Transition

### 5. packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts
- Add optional lifecycle field to AgentSchema.Struct (inline sub-schema)

### 6. packages/opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
- Add optional lifecycle field to Agent.Info Schema.Struct (inline sub-schema)

## Non-goals (deferred per critic)
- Tests for engine state machine — deferred to follow-up lane
- Effect.withSpan annotations — deferred to follow-up lane
- Import shared LifecycleDefinitionSchema instead of inline — deferred to follow-up
revision_notes: Addressed critic feedback: removed duplicate constants from definition.ts, use standalone interfaces to fix readonly/mutable type errors, added onPhaseEnter/onPhaseExit hooks to engine
